message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "POINT AWARDS" and contains no substantive body text. It does not provide definitions, procedures, metrics, dates, entities, claims, tables, figures, or evidence types. Consequently, it cannot answer any specific questions regarding point awards beyond confirming the presence of a section with this title on page 1.
